testcases.input: folder = ["/a","/a/b","/c/d","/c/d/e","/c/f"] Output: ["/a","/c/d","/c/f"] Explanation: Folders "/a/b" is a subfolder of "/a" and "/c/d/e" is inside of folder "/c/d" in our filesystem.
testcases.expectedOutput: ["/a","/c/d","/c/f"] Explanation: Folders "/a/b" is a subfolder of "/a" and "/c/d/e" is inside of folder "/c/d" in our filesystem.

testcases.input: folder = ["/a","/a/b/c","/a/b/d"] Output: ["/a"] Explanation: Folders "/a/b/c" and "/a/b/d" will be removed because they are subfolders of "/a".
testcases.expectedOutput: ["/a"] Explanation: Folders "/a/b/c" and "/a/b/d" will be removed because they are subfolders of "/a".
